g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with GetFunction until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
Reuse the spec ID, status ID, or name-resolved OCID for every later update and delete call.
Write the invoke-endpoint Secret only when InvokeEndpoint is present.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
verify the live endpoint needed for Secret generation
upsert the owned Secret for the usable active resource
- The formal secret profile is stronger than current code because an
active function without InvokeEndpoint still returns success without
- Retryable OCI states must not create invoke-endpoint Secrets.
